prompt: I have this page snippet and want you to review it and fix any design system violations (white background, #333 text, border-radius, box-shadow, Arial font, color:blue accent).

assertions.description: background:#fff not present in fixed output
border-radius property not present in fixed.html
box-shadow property not present in fixed.html
color:blue or #0000ff not present in fixed.html
#f3f1ec or var(--fg) or var(--dim) used for text in fixed.html
review.md file exists with violation descriptions
review.md mentions at least 4 of the 6 violations in the snippet
